Homebrew Formulae

pgbadger

Install command:

Log analyzer for PostgreSQL

https://pgbadger.darold.net/

License: PostgreSQL

Development: Pull requests

Formula JSON API: /api/formula/pgbadger.json

Formula code: pgbadger.rb on GitHub

Bottle (binary package) installation support provided.

Current versions:

stable ✅ 13.2
head ⚡️ HEAD
You must configure your PostgreSQL server before using pgBadger.
Edit postgresql.conf (in $HOMEBREW_PREFIX/var/postgres if you use Homebrew's
PostgreSQL), set the following parameters, and restart PostgreSQL:

    log_destination = 'stderr'
    log_line_prefix = '%t [%p]: [%l-1] user=%u,db=%d '
    log_statement = 'none'
    log_duration = off
    log_min_duration_statement = 0
    log_checkpoints = on
    log_connections = on
    log_disconnections = on
    log_lock_waits = on
    log_temp_files = 0
    lc_messages = 'C'
